title: Mati Staniszewski appointed to Klarna Group PLC Board of Directors
full_text:
London, UK - 23 May 2025 - Klarna, the AI-powered payments and commerce network, confirms Mati Staniszewski has joined the board of directors for Klarna Group PLC. 

Mati Staniszewski is the co-founder and CEO of ElevenLabs, a voice AI research and deployment company, building products for enterprises, developers, and creators. The ElevenLabs platform empowers millions of individuals and thousands of businesses to create high-quality voice overs at scale, and launch interactive AI voice agents, in more than 30 languages. Before starting ElevenLabs, Mati worked as a Deployment Strategist at Palantir, overseeing large-scale implementations of its products across public and private sectors. 

"AI is making more capabilities accessible to more people than ever before, and Klarna is leading the way in applying it at real scale across their entire business. They’re setting the standard for how AI can amplify user experience, and I’m excited to support their continued AI acceleration." said Mati Staniszewski. 

"Mati has a unique understanding of how AI advances can translate into great products and impact in the real world. Klarna has already shown how AI can radically reshape productivity, customer service, and product development. With Mati on the board, we’re doubling down on our ambition to stay at the forefront of this revolution," said Sebastian Siemiatkowski, CEO, co-founder and member of the board, Klarna Group PLC. 

Mati was appointed by the board of directors of Klarna Group PLC at a board meeting held on 13 May 2025.
